refund policy: Our refund policy allows 5 days to return the product.
shipping time: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days for domestic, 5-7 business days for international.
reset password: To reset your password, click on the forgot password link on the login page. It's in the bottom-left corner of the page.
cancel subscription: To cancel your subscription, go to Account Settings and select Manage Subscriptions. Click the Cancel button and confirm your choice.
track order: You can track your order by logging into your account and viewing Orders, or by entering your order number on our tracking page.
contact support: Our support team is available 24/7 via email at support@company.com or by phone at 1-800-555-0123.
product warranty: All products come with a 1-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects. Register your product online to activate.
size guide: Our size guide provides detailed measurements for all products. Measure yourself and compare to the chart for the best fit.
